violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of soil residue and biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen and dry storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026

The cutting board at the food prep sink is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the 10 burner stove, and the floor mixer has an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026

The wall behind the dishwasher has an accumulation of soil residue and/or mildew. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026

The ceiling vents in the dish room near the ice machine have an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026
Shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -ice machine -vents to low boy at bar. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2024
The pre flush faucet was observed in poor repair, observed taped. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2024
The outside dumpsters are not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024

The following have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris: -floors under shelving in dry storage area -ventilation hood (left side). The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2024
